meta.description: RDAP lookup for domains, IPs, and ASNs
command.help.rdap:
/rdap [Domain/IP/ASN] - Query RDAP information
Inline: @NachoNekoX_bot rdap [Domain/IP/ASN]
Supported formats: domain(example.com), IP(1.1.1.1), ASN(AS13335 or 13335)
inline.usage_text:
Usage: rdap [Domain/IP/ASN]
Supported: domain, IP, ASN (AS13335 or 13335)
